name: ultraloop
description: Autonomous product loop for Claude Code that ORCHESTRATES proven skills rather than reimplementing them — gh-roadmap (bundled since v0.9.0; milestone-scoped runs since v0.10.0) owns the GitHub Projects board; design/strategy/spec/TDD/E2E skills do the work, and an entirely optional gstack lane (referenced, never bundled) plugs in at mapped steps with built-in fallbacks and ultraloop keeping all merge/deploy authority. THREE role-separated skills plus the bundled board authority: ultraloop:design crafts the UI/UX to a verifiable score (Google-Stitch foundation + the harness's verified design tools, in a generate -> cold multi-model critique -> integrate -> re-score loop) and hands an approved design system to pm; ultraloop:pm plans (product-strategy -> outcome-roadmap -> strategy-red-team -> speckit -> prioritization) and writes the board; ultraloop:loop reads that board and ships it via TDD + pre-merge production E2E, faithfully logging progress back to the board. The board is the single source of truth.
